mapper.select:
select * from orders
and number like concat('%', #{number}, '%')
and status = #{status}
order by order_time desc
select * from orders where pay_status = 1 order by order_time desc
mapper.insert: insert into orders ( number, status, user_id, order_time, checkout_time, pay_method, pay_status, amount, remark, phone, address, user_name, consignee, cancel_reason, rejection_reason, cancel_time, estimated_delivery_time, delivery_status, delivery_time, shipping_fee, address_book_id ) values ( #{number}, #{status}, #{userId}, #{orderTime}, #{checkoutTime}, #{payMethod}, #{payStatus}, #{amount}, #{remark}, #{phone}, #{address}, #{userName}, #{consignee}, #{cancelReason}, #{rejectionReason}, #{cancelTime}, #{estimatedDeliveryTime}, #{deliveryStatus}, #{deliveryTime}, #{shippingFee}, #{addressBookId} )
